name: @hasna/deployment
description: General-purpose deployment orchestration for AI agents — provision infrastructure, deploy apps, manage environments. CLI + MCP + REST + SDK.

scripts.build: bun build src/cli/index.ts --outdir dist/cli --target bun --external commander --external chalk --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external hono --external @hasna/secrets && bun build src/mcp/index.ts --outdir dist/mcp --target bun --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk && bun build src/server/index.ts --outdir dist/server --target bun --external hono && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist

author: Andrei Hasna <andrei@hasna.com>
